faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I book this safari?
faq.a1: You can book directly through our website by clicking 'Book Now' or 'Inquire', or contact us via WhatsApp or email. Our team will respond within 24 hours with a personalized proposal.
faq.a2: Absolutely! Every safari we offer can be tailored to your preferences, budget, and travel dates. We can adjust accommodation, add extra days, or modify activities to suit your needs.
faq.q3: What should I pack for this safari?
faq.a3: We recommend neutral-colored clothing (khaki, beige, olive), comfortable walking shoes, sun protection (hat, sunscreen, sunglasses), binoculars, a camera, and layers for cooler mornings and evenings.
faq.a4: We strongly recommend comprehensive travel insurance that covers trip cancellation, medical emergencies, and evacuation. Some parks and activities may require proof of insurance.

parks.title: National Parks & Reserves
parks.subtitle: Discover Africa's most breathtaking natural wonders

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: When is the best time to visit this park?
faq.a1: The best time varies by park, but generally the dry season (June to October) offers the best wildlife viewing as animals gather around water sources. The wet season (November to May) is ideal for birdwatching and lush landscapes.
faq.q2: What wildlife can I expect to see?
faq.a2: Each park has its unique wildlife. Our expert guides will help you spot the area's most iconic species. Sightings depend on season and time of day, but our experienced guides know the best spots.
faq.q3: Are there entry fees for the park?
faq.a3: Yes, all national parks and reserves have entry fees. These are typically included in our safari packages. Fees vary by park, visitor nationality, and age category. Contact us for current rates.
faq.q4: How do I get to this park?
faq.a4: Most parks are accessible by road from Arusha or nearby towns. We provide comfortable 4x4 vehicles with experienced drivers for all transfers. Some remote parks also offer fly-in options.

detail.lead: {name} is a safari {type} in {region}, Tanzania, offering comfortable stays close to the wildlife as part of a Kabengo Safaris itinerary.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is included in a stay at this property?
faq.a1: Rates at most safari lodges and camps are full board (accommodation and all meals). Park fees, drinks and activities are detailed separately in your quote — we confirm exactly what's included when we tailor your itinerary.
faq.q2: How do I get to this lodge or camp?
faq.a2: Most properties are reached by road transfer or a short bush flight to a nearby airstrip. Your Kabengo Safaris itinerary includes all transfers between destinations.
faq.q3: Is it suitable for families or children?
faq.a3: Many lodges and camps welcome families, though some tented camps set a minimum age for young children. Tell us your group's ages and we'll match you with the right property.
faq.q4: When is the best time to stay?
faq.a4: It depends on the region — the dry season (June–October) is best for wildlife, while the green season (November–May) is quieter and lush. We advise based on your travel dates.

about.title: About Kabengo Safaris
about.subtitle: Your gateway to unforgettable African adventures
about.storyText: Kabengo Safaris was born from a deep passion for Africa's wildlife and landscapes. With years of experience in the safari industry, we craft personalized journeys that connect travelers with the raw beauty of East Africa.
about.missionText: To provide exceptional safari experiences that inspire conservation, support local communities, and create lifelong memories for our guests.
about.visionText: To be East Africa's most trusted safari company, known for responsible tourism, expert guidance, and unmatched wildlife experiences.
about.whyExpertGuidesDesc: Our certified guides bring decades of wildlife knowledge and local expertise to every safari.
about.whyCustomItinerariesDesc: Every safari is tailored to your interests, budget, and travel style.
about.whySafetyFirstDesc: Your safety is our top priority with comprehensive insurance and emergency protocols.
about.whySustainableDesc: We're committed to conservation and supporting the communities we visit.

meta.planDescription: Bou jou pasgemaakte Tanzanië-safari in omtrent 'n minuut — vertel ons wat jou opgewonde maak, wanneer jy sou reis en jou begroting, en 'n Kabengo-spesialis antwoord binne 24 uur.

privacy.bannerMessage: We respect your privacy — this website does not use cookies or tracking.

bookSection.title: Bespreek vandag jou droomsafari
bookSection.intro: 'n Safari in Tanzanië is 'n eenmalige reis — en ons maak dit joune. Van die Serengeti-vlaktes en die Ngorongoro-krater tot die strande van Zanzibar en die kruin van Kilimanjaro: kies een van ons klaargemaakte reisplanne of bou jou eie, presies soos jy daarvan hou.
bookSection.bestWayTitle: Die beste manier om Tanzanië te verken
bookSection.bestWayBody: Ons is 'n span plaaslike mense in Arusha, met ons eie gidse en safarivoertuie wat hierdie land goed ken en elke besonderheid van begin tot einde reël. Vertel ons van watter parke en ervarings jy droom — ons ontwerp die perfekte reis om jou.
bookSection.trust1: Ons eie plaaslike gidse en safari-Land Cruisers
bookSection.trust3: Eerlike, deursigtige pryse — geen tussengangers nie

planner.interestsSub: Kies een of meer — ons weef hulle in een reis saam.
planner.whereSub: Soek en kies die parke wat jou roep — of slaan oor, en ons stel 'n roete voor.
planner.noParks: Geen parke stem met “{query}” ooreen nie.
planner.daysSub: 'n Rowwe idee is perfek — ons verfyn dit saam.
planner.daysHelp: Nog nie seker nie — help my besluit
planner.whenSub: Die beste wildseisoen is Junie–Oktober — maar elke maand het sy towerkrag.
planner.whenFlex: Ek is buigsaam / nog nie seker nie
planner.childAgesTitle: Ouderdom van elke kind tydens die reis
planner.notesSub: Hoe meer jy deel, hoe meer pasgemaak is jou voorstel.
planner.notesPlaceholder: Spesifieke lodges, moet-sien diere, kamertipe, safari + strand kombineer…
planner.detailsSub: Sodat 'n spesialis jou met jou voorstel kan bereik.
planner.consent: Ek wil hê Kabengo moet my oor my safari-voorstel kontak. Nooit gemorspos nie.
planner.reviewSub: 'n Vinnige nagaan — tik Terug om enigiets te verander, stuur dit dan aan ons.
planner.errName: Voer asseblief jou naam en van in.
planner.errConsent: Bevestig asseblief dat ons jou oor jou voorstel mag kontak.
planner.errGeneric: Iets het verkeerd geloop. Probeer asseblief weer.
planner.successBody: Ons sal jou pasgemaakte reisplan skep en 'n persoonlike safari-spesialis sal binne 24 uur antwoord. Hou jou inboks dop.
planner.railBody: Beantwoord 'n paar vinnige vrae en 'n plaaslike kundige bou 'n gratis, geen-verpligting voorstel — reisplan, lodges en eerlike pryse, alles om jou gevorm.

howItWorks.title: Jou reis, van droom tot vertrek
howItWorks.intro: Om 'n pasgemaakte safari te beplan is eenvoudiger as wat jy dink — so werk dit.
howItWorks.s1b: Sê vir ons wat jou opgewonde maak, wanneer jy sou reis en jou begroting — in die beplanner of met 'n kort boodskap.
howItWorks.s2b: 'n Plaaslike kundige ontwerp 'n persoonlike reisplan met lodges en eerlike pryse — gratis, geen verpligting.
howItWorks.s3b: Verander enigiets totdat dit perfek is; ons adviseer oor parke, tydsberekening en begroting.
howItWorks.s4b: Jou eie gids en 4×4 hanteer elke besonderheid, van aankoms tot vertrek.
